items.name: identity
items.title: identity
items.description: CIDS identity-hue helpers — deterministic per-wallet hue (hash % 8) + avatar gradient. Dependency of Avatar/AvatarGroup.

items.name: tokens
items.title: tokens
items.description: The CIDS token layer: surfaces/fg/brand/semantic/identity hues, spacing, z, elevation, motion, financial type ramp, 4 themes (dark/mono/light/violet) + the compact density axis. Import from your root layout AFTER tailwindcss.
